contracts.note: INTC call buyers are aggressively lifting offers with volume at 1.3x open interest, and an additional 9k contracts traded this hour alone. The $3.8M premium on a 5% OTM strike with only two days to expiration suggests a highly tactical bet on an immediate, outsized move, especially given the elevated 89% implied volatility.

Micron call buyers are hitting bids on a 15% OTM strike with only two days to expiration, with today's volume already double the existing open interest and an additional 6k contracts traded this hour. The $4.1M premium and 100% implied volatility suggest a highly speculative bet on a massive, immediate move higher, but the bid tape indicates sellers are readily exiting positions rather than aggressively exiting.

The 8800 ASTS calls trading 4x open interest with 2 days to expiration and 19% OTM are being bought below the bid, suggesting sellers are aggressive or buyers are patient. The 137% implied volatility indicates the market expects a massive move, but the $0.9M premium is relatively small for such a far out-of-the-money strike, making the conviction unclear.

QQQ put buyers are aggressively lifting offers on expiring contracts, with today's volume already exceeding open interest and an additional 5k contracts traded this hour alone. The 5.6% out-of-the-money strike with zero days to expiration, trading at the ask, indicates a tactical bet on a significant downward move before expiration, despite the relatively low implied volatility.

Same-day QQQ puts 5% out of the money saw 7x volume relative to open interest, with buyers aggressively lifting offers on the ask this hour. The high volume on zero days to expiration suggests a tactical hedge or a bet on a sharp intraday move, though the low premium and 40% IV don't indicate significant conviction.

This hour saw 2025 AMKR call contracts trade on the bid, with volume at 1.6x open interest suggesting new positions are being opened. The 51-day expiration and 12% out-of-the-money strike, combined with 76% implied volatility, indicate a tactical bet on a significant upward move in the stock price over the next month and a half.
